name: Yatsumeguri | 八つ巡
short_description: Light eight candles. Visit the shrine where the strange phenomena lurk and aim to return from the closed space.
detailed_description:
You are trapped in a shrine.
To escape, you must follow the Code.

Rules

When the anomaly appears,
Ring the bell
And return to the starting point.

When the anomaly does not appear,
Do not ring the bell
But return nonetheless.

Light eight candles.


◆A Japanese-Themed Walking Simulator
“Yatsumeguri” is a short walking simulator inspired by the original scenery of Japanese shrines and other settings, as well as The Exit 8.

◆This game contains some horror elements.

◆Supernatural Phenomena Using Sound
Some of the supernatural phenomena awaiting the player need to be identified by sound, so we recommend using speakers or headphones.

◆Playtime
The estimated playtime is between 15 and 60 minutes.

◆Video Distribution Guidelines
・Posting and streaming videos are allowed without permission, regardless of whether you are an individual or a corporation.
・Monetization is allowed only when using the features provided by video distribution platforms.
・It would be appreciated if you could include the game's name in the title of your video or stream and add a link to the Steam page in the description.
・We do not take any responsibility for any damages incurred from posting or streaming videos of this game.
・The contents of these guidelines are subject to change without notice.
